metadata.description: Painel executivo para receita, margem, clientes e operação.

metric_contract.calculation: Deduplicate by ID Venda before summing Total do Pedido (R$).
metric_contract.limitations: Includes shipping and subtracts discounts; only completed paid/shipped orders.

metric_contract.calculation: Sum Subtotal Item (R$) over item-grain rows.
metric_contract.limitations: Does not include shipping or order-level discount.
Product-level gross profit before non-product operating costs.

metric_contract.calculation: Deduplicate orders by ID Venda, group by ID Cliente, then sum Total do Pedido (R$).
metric_contract.limitations: Customers without completed orders are retained with zero values if present in the dimension.

metric_contract.calculation: Join cart item subtotals to open or abandoned carts.
metric_contract.limitations: Potential recovery value is not forecast revenue.

insights.title: SP lidera a receita do recorte

business_questions.question: Qual foi a receita de pedidos?
business_questions.answer: R$ 160.692,02 em pedidos concluídos, deduplicando Fato Vendas por ID Venda.

business_questions.question: Quais clientes sao mais valiosos?
business_questions.answer: Use charts.top_customers, calculado com receita de pedidos concluídos por cliente.

business_questions.question: Como está a retenção?
business_questions.answer: Use charts.customer_cohorts para acompanhar atividade por mês de primeira compra.
